image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Stem cells can transform into any cell type — but they're not magic.
Context visual: Pluripotent stem cells have endless potential, while adult stem cells are more limited.
Escalation visual: Approved uses include blood and bone marrow regeneration. But many applications are still experimental.
Evidence visual: The NIH emphasizes caution. Unproven clinics may promise miracles, but often deliver disappointment.
Payoff visual: Understanding stem cells means recognizing their power, but also their limits. They’re tools for healing, not silver bul
Cta visual: Curious about stem cells? Hit like and follow for more science insights!
